commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Then lest this should seem owing to their peculiar weakness, he joined others also with them, and as yet condemned them not. But why does he say, And as many as have not seen my face in the flesh? He shows here after a divine manner, that they saw him constantly in the Spirit. And he bears witness to their great love.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
